allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Consolidate rfq, rfq-direct, and pricing into market-maker package

Merges 3 separate packages into a single @greek/market-maker package with
mode-based execution via yarn commands \(direct, bebop, relay, all\).

## Structure
- src/pricing/     - Black-Scholes, pricer, spotFeed \(from rfq-direct\)
- src/servers/     - HTTP API, WebSocket stream & relay
- src/bebop/       - RFQ client, relay, signing, protobuf
- src/config/      - Chains, tokens, options \(multi-chain support\)
- src/modes/       - Mode entry points \(direct, bebop, relay\)
- src/index.ts     - Main entry with singleton pattern

## Features
- Single Pricer instance shared across modes \(no duplication\)
- Graceful shutdown handling \(SIGTERM/SIGINT\)
- Mode validation with clear error messages
- Master chain configuration \(8 chains, Chainlink price feeds\)
- Master token configuration \(multi-chain token addresses\)
- Centralized option deployment tracking

## Changes
- Remove: rfq/, rfq-direct/, pricing/, aggregator/
- Add: market-maker/ with consolidated codebase
- Update root package.json workspaces
- Yarn commands: yarn direct, yarn bebop, yarn relay, yarn all

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor to separate entry points instead of MODE routing

Replace single index.ts with mode routing with three dedicated entry files:
- src/direct.ts  → yarn direct
- src/bebop.ts   → yarn bebop  
- src/relay.ts   → yarn relay

Benefits:
- Simpler, more obvious entry points
- No MODE env var indirection
- Each service is completely independent
- Clearer for debugging
- No mode validation needed

Package.json now points directly to entry files instead of using MODE=x.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
